title: Dinner Chat 晚餐聊天
scene: 一家人晚上边吃晚饭边聊天。

lines.en: It was great! We had a fun PE class.
lines.zh: 很好！我们上了有趣的体育课。

lines.en: What did you do in PE class?
We played basketball. I scored three points!
lines.zh: 我们打篮球了。我得了三分！

lines.en: That is wonderful! I am proud of you.
Dad, can we play basketball together this weekend?
lines.zh: 爸爸，这周末我们能一起打篮球吗？

lines.en: Of course. Saturday morning sounds good.
lines.zh: 当然可以。周六上午不错。

lines.en: Mom, this soup is delicious. What is in it?
lines.zh: 妈妈，这个汤好喝。里面放了什么？

lines.en: Your mom makes the best soup in the world.
lines.zh: 你妈妈做的汤是世界上最好喝的。

lines.en: I agree! Can I have some more, please?
